title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd!
